title: SECOND CHANCE THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: SECOND CHANCE THRIFT STORE SECOND CHANCE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The thrift store generates revenue to support the Gospel Rescue Mission, provides work opportunities for Mission residents, accepts donations of goods from community members, and provides assistance to those in need through a clothing voucher program. 429 SE 6th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, Saturday 9am-4pm (541) 479-9748 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 479-9748 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: Varies by product DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Josephine County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the corner of 6th and J Streets Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Clothing Vouchers Donation Drop Off Points Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Kitchenware Donation Programs Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
